questionText: Break down your total gross global Scope 1 and 2 emissions by country/area.
questionKo: 글로벌 총 Scope 1 및 Scope 2 배출량을 국가/지역(country/area)별로 구분하여 입력하십시오.
sectorTags: Oil & Gas, Coal, General, Aviation, Capital goods, Transport OEMS - EPM, Chemicals, Metals & mining, Transport services, Steel, Agricultural commodities, Transport OEMS, Energy utilities & power generators, Cement, Food, beverage & tobacco, Paper & forestry, Real estate, Construction
simpleHelp: By breaking down emissions to country/area level, information and data can be made available to help guide the development of emissions-related legislation.

guidance.text:
General 
This question does not appear to Financial Services-only organizations.
Breaking down emissions to the country/area level is useful to investors as this is often the level at which emissions-related legislation is introduced. Emissions should be attributed to individual countries/areas wherever possible. CDP considers reporting emissions broken down by country/area best practice.
Negative numbers are not allowed as organizations are to report gross, not net figures.
Emissions figures should be for the reporting year only (as defined by your answer to 1.4).
The emissions breakdown should denote the actual emissions occurring in the given country/area and being counted in that country's emissions inventory, independent of, e.g. financial presence in the country/area.
If 100% emissions from a country have been excluded from disclosure then 0 should be entered for that country.
Your response to columns "Scope 2, location-based (metric tons CO2e)" and "Scope 2, market-based (metric tons CO2e)" should align with your approach to reporting scope 2 emissions as disclosed in 7.3. For example, if you answered in 7.3 that you are not reporting a scope 2 location-based figure, you can leave the corresponding column blank.
Emissions occurring in international waters should be consistently allocated to the countries/areas listed. The approach should be detailed in the "Methodological details" column of 7.6 and/or 7.7.
Country/area (column 0) 
Organizations will be presented with a row for each country/area selected in 1.7.
Scope 2, location-based (metric tons CO2e) (column 2) 
This column does not appear for the Energy utilities & power generators sector.
Scope 2, market-based (metric tons CO2e) (column 3) 
This column does not appear for the Energy utilities & power generators sector.

Points will be awarded per row in proportion to the number of rows disclosed as follows:
'Scope 1…' column completed AND either column 'Scope 2, location-based…' OR 'Scope 2, market-based…' completed.
A maximum of 4/4 points is available for this question.

criteria.criteria:
ROUTE A)
If 'We are reporting a Scope 2 location based figure' selected in column 'Scope 2 location-based' In question 7.3 AND ' We are reporting a scope 2 market-based figure selected in column 'Scope 2 market-based' in question 7.3.
i) Sum of figures provided in column 'Scope 1 emissions…' is equal to the figure provided in column 'Gross global Scope 1 emissions…' in row 'Reporting year' in question 7.6 (± 5%) - 2 points
ii) Sum of figures provided in column 'Scope 2, location-based (metric tons CO2e)' is equal to the figure provided in column 'Scope 2, location-based' in row 'Reporting year' in question 7.7 (± 5%) - 2 points
iii) Sum of figures provided in column 'Scope 2, market-based (metric tons CO2e)' is equal to the figure provided in column 'Scope 2, market-based...' in row 'Reported year' in question 7.7 (± 5%) - 2 points
A maximum of 6/6 points is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE B)
If 'We are not reporting a Scope 2, location-based figure' selected in column 'Scope 2 location-base' In question 7.3 AND 'We are reporting a scope 2 market-based figure selected in column 'Scope 2 market-based' in question 7.3
i) Sum of figures provided in column 'Scope 1 emissions…' is equal to the figure provided in column 'Gross global Scope 1 emissions…' in row 'Reporting year' in question 7.6 (± 5%) - 2 points
ii) Sum of figures provided in column 'Scope 2, market-based (metric tons CO2e)' is equal to the figure provided in column 'Scope 2, market-based...' in row 'Reported year' in question 7.7 (± 5%) - 2 points
A maximum of 4/4 points is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE C)
If 'We are reporting a Scope 2 location based figure' selected in column 'Scope 2 location-base' In question 7.3 AND ' We have no operations where we are able to access electricity supplier emission factors or residual emission factors, and are unable to report a Scope 2, market-based figure' OR 'We have operations where we are able to access electricity supplier emission factors or residual emissions factors, but are unable to report a Scope 2, market-based figure' selected in column 'Scope 2 market-based' in question 7.3.
i) Sum of figures provided in column 'Scope 1 emissions…' is equal to the figure provided in column 'Gross global Scope 1 emissions…' in row 'Reporting year' in question 7.6 (± 5%) - 2 points
ii) Sum of figures provided in column 'Scope 2, location-based (metric tons CO2e)' is equal to the figure provided in column 'Scope 2, location-based' in row 'Reporting year' in question 7.7 (± 5%) - 2 points
A maximum of 4/4 points is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE D)
If 'We are not reporting a Scope 2, location-based figure' selected in column 'Scope 2, location-based' in question 7.3 AND any option excluding 'We are reporting a Scope 2, market-based figure' selected in column 'Scope 2, market-based' in question 7.3.
i) Sum of figures provided in column 'Scope 1 emissions…' is equal to the figure provided in column 'Gross global Scope 1 emissions…' in row 'Reporting year' in question 7.6 (± 5%) - 2/6 points
A maximum of 2/6 points is available for this route.

criteria.criteria:
ROUTE A)
If 'We are reporting a Scope 2 location based figure' selected in column 'Scope 2 location-based' In question 7.3 AND ' We are reporting a scope 2 market-based figure selected in column 'Scope 2 market-based' in question 7.3.
i) Sum of figures provided in column 'Scope 1 emissions…' is equal to the figure provided in column 'Gross global Scope 1 emissions…' in row 'Reporting year' in question 7.6 (± 5%) - 2 points
ii) Sum of figures provided in column 'Scope 2, location-based (metric tons CO2e)' is equal to the figure provided in column 'Scope 2, location-based' in row 'Reporting year' in question 7.7 (± 5%) - 2 points
iii) Sum of figures provided in column 'Scope 2, market-based (metric tons CO2e)' is equal to the figure provided in column 'Scope 2, market-based...' in row 'Reported year' in question 7.7 (± 5%) - 2 points
A maximum of 6/6 points is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE B)
If 'We are not reporting a Scope 2, location-based figure' selected in column 'Scope 2 location-base' In question 7.3 AND 'We are reporting a scope 2 market-based figure selected in column 'Scope 2 market-based' in question 7.3
i) Sum of figures provided in column 'Scope 1 emissions…' is equal to the figure provided in column 'Gross global Scope 1 emissions…' in row 'Reporting year' in question 7.6 (± 5%) - 2 points
ii) Sum of figures provided in column 'Scope 2, market-based (metric tons CO2e)' is equal to the figure provided in column 'Scope 2, market-based...' in row 'Reported year' in question 7.7 (± 5%) - 2 points
A maximum of 4/4 points is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE C)
If 'We are reporting a Scope 2 location based figure' selected in column 'Scope 2 location-base' In question 7.3 AND ' We have no operations where we are able to access electricity supplier emission factors or residual emission factors, and are unable to report a Scope 2, market-based figure' OR 'We have operations where we are able to access electricity supplier emission factors or residual emissions factors, but are unable to report a Scope 2, market-based figure' selected in column 'Scope 2 market-based' in question 7.3.
i) Sum of figures provided in column 'Scope 1 emissions…' is equal to the figure provided in column 'Gross global Scope 1 emissions…' in row 'Reporting year' in question 7.6 (± 5%) - 2 points
ii) Sum of figures provided in column 'Scope 2, location-based (metric tons CO2e)' is equal to the figure provided in column 'Scope 2, location-based' in row 'Reporting year' in question 7.7 (± 5%) - 2 points
A maximum of 4/4 points is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE D)
If 'We are not reporting a Scope 2, location-based figure' selected in column 'Scope 2, location-based' in question 7.3 AND any option excluding 'We are reporting a Scope 2, market-based figure' selected in column 'Scope 2, market-based' in question 7.3.
i) Sum of figures provided in column 'Scope 1 emissions…' is equal to the figure provided in column 'Gross global Scope 1 emissions…' in row 'Reporting year' in question 7.6 (± 5%) - 2/6 points
A maximum of 2/6 points is available for this route.
